ab: kitjumalju tjanusun a macidilj.
ti Sakinu aen a Tjuridri, tapuluq anga u cavilj tucu.
en: My name is Tjuridri, and I’m 10 years old.

ab: tima su ngadan?
ti Kuliu a u ngadan.
anema nu zukuan sun a kakedriyan?
en: What ethnic group are you from?

ab: sePaiwan aen a kakedriyan.
sekacalisiyan mun a tacekeljan?
ch: A:你的家人都是原住民嗎?
en: Are all your family members indigenous?

ab: uy, sePaiwan amen a tacaekeljan.
ch: B:是的，我們全家都是排灣族人。
en: Yes, my whole family is Paiwan.

ab: sekacalisiyan a su tacemekeljan?
ch: A:你的家人都是原住民嗎?
en: Are all your family members indigenous?

ab: ini, sePaiwana u kama, pairang a u kina.
ch: B:不是，我的爸爸是排灣族，我的媽媽是漢人。
en: No, my father is Paiwan, and my mother is Han Taiwanese.

ab: nimasun a aljak?
ni Sakinu a Tjuridri aen a aljak.
en: I am Sakinu a Tjuridri’s child.

ab: su kama zua caucau? pidanga cvavilj nimadju?
ch: A:那位是你爸爸嗎? 他幾歲了?
en: Is that your father? How old is he?

ab: unem anga puluq a cavilj nimadju.
su kama zua caucau? pidanga cavilj nimadju?
ch: A:那位是你爸爸嗎? 他幾歲了?
en: Is that your father? How old is he?

ab: malji, nia ramaljeng i qinaljan timadju, alu anga puluq a cavilj nimadju.
ch: B:不是，他是我們部落的耆老，他80歲了。
en: No, he is an elder of our tribe. He is 80 years old.

ab: pida nga cavilj na su kaka tjavulung a uqaljay?
tapuluq saka alu anga cavili nimadju.
tjavulung tjanusun tu liyaw a cavilj na su kaka tjavulung a uqaljay?
ch: A:你哥哥年紀比你大很多嗎?
en: Is your brother much older than you?

ab: lima cavilj a sikatjavulung tjanuaen nimadju.
makudakuda su kinaqaca?
izua 140 kunghun a u kinaqaca.
sicuayan anga u ljinengljengan tjanusun, qadjawsun a na meqaca nga?
ch: A:好久不見，你是不是長高了?
en: I haven’t seen you in a while. Have you grown taller?

ab: uy lja, izua nga 130kunghun a u kinaqaca.
qadjawsun a mekudral anga?
neka ei, na pasaliu sun a pacun.
mariljay anga sun?
neka ei, mekudral anga en.
mekudral anga sun?
uy lja, izua 30 kungcin a u kinasdjelung tucu.
